current_status.layout_check: passing; legacy-path scan skipped with warning when ripgrep is unavailable

known_follow_ups: x402-bridge sovereignty remediation: cost-accounting ledger, documented failure/retry envelope (fix dead X402_MAX_CONCURRENT knob + User-Agent gap), and wiring to a sovereign-agent consumer (or archive). Smoke test GREEN 2026-07-10 (PR #30, eth_blockNumber on monad-mainnet); package remains LEGACY_NON_SOVEREIGN per docs/LEGACY_COMPONENTS.md §6.

Layer 7 data-generation consumer LANDED (this PR): new @sovereign/gnosis-training-data package turns a Layer 6 canonical_schedule into Gnosis training events (JSONL) by reusing @sovereign/ttcl scoreSign — deterministic + byte-reproducible, one event per accepted step, Catalan slot labels emitted as null pending the data asset. Still unbuilt: the full Layer 7 Training Pipeline (SFT→Reward→PPO→Eval; LLaMA 3.1 8B + QLoRA + HuggingFace TRL) — a real GPU job, deliberately not stubbed. Still open as DATA (not code): the real 45-pair Llull PairTable + Catalan slot labels + the Theologia wheel (the scheduler + consumer are data-driven via shared/fixtures/layer6/wheel-registry.json, so they drop in as a data change). Out of spec scope: a scheduler CLI / W&B tracking.

Layer 7 training-pipeline wiring LANDED (this PR): new root-level gnosis-training/ Python package (uv-managed, sibling to gnostic-engine/) — real SFTTrainer/RewardTrainer/PPOTrainer + QLoRA configs as runnable code (TTCL_v1_0_BREAKDOWN.md:275-311), import-smoke-verified, CPU-verified. NO training executed — the LLaMA 3.1 8B run is an explicitly-future GPU job (deliberately not stubbed, no fake completion). Every spec silence concretized in generated/hyperparams.py (LoRA r=64/α=128/dropout=0.05, AdamW lr=2e-4 cosine warmup 3%, 4-bit nf4, seed=42, eval thresholds). TRL VERSION PIN (load-bearing): trl>=0.12,<0.14 — the spec names PPO (line 305) but TRL removed the PPO stack after the 0.12-0.13 PPOv2 window (gone by 0.14+ and all 1.x, where only DPO/GRPO/KTO remain); ppo.py targets the PPOv2-era constructor signature, so the package pins to that exact window (uv sync resolves trl==0.13.0, all four symbols importable) — PPO is genuinely runnable, spec-faithful, NOT silently substituted with GRPO/DPO. Preference-pair builder emits a bootstrap worksheet (empty responses + rubric scores pre-filled from constitution_score) for a human authoring pass; the reward model still trains on HUMAN-judged pairs (spec line 478), not the scaffold — constitution_score is NOT the RM label / NOT a PPO reward (seeds the worksheet rubric + gates SFT via passes). W&B/MLflow/DVC + bitsandbytes wired-but-deferred behind opt-in extras (tracking/dvc/qlora). Local-only pytest posture (NO Python added to ci.yml; mirrors gnostic-engine/); pnpm-lock.yaml untouched (uv.lock, not pnpm). Verified: ruff clean, mypy --strict 17 files clean WITH the full ML stack installed (uv sync resolves trl==0.13.0 under the PPOv2 pin — the honest green, not absent-deps green), pytest 66 passed/0 skipped with the stack / 60 passed/2 skipped without (datasets + smoke-imports skip via importorskip — honest), pnpm check:layout green for gnosis-training. Remaining frontier: the full Layer 7 GPU run + human-judged preference pairs + the 45-pair PairTable/Catalan labels/Theologia wheel data asset.
